attributes.name: Beginner 1 (Pre-Alpha) - Saturday 10:15am
attributes.description: Class Time: 10:15am - 10:45am Practice/Free time: 10:45 - 11:15am Beginner 1/Pre-Alpha First beginner level skating class for both Skating & Hockey ages 6-17 Class curriculum: Two-foot glide. One-foot glide/ right foot/ left foot. Forward Swizzle. Backward Wiggle. Backward Swizzle. Forward Pumps.There are no refunds, make ups or credits for missed classes.
